description: CompositionPure leather tote bag in black with same colour zippers and white stitch detailingThis big tote bag is the ultimate piece of style. With ample space for all that you want to carry, including a spare set of clothes, you are all set to go on that special date or on an evening out with friends. Available in attractive colours like blood red, teal blue, moody grey, in-fashion yellow, sober beige, turquoise blue and neutral brown, the white stitch detailing adds a glam look to this uber stylish tote bag.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
